mapper.select: SELECT id , stock_cd , fiscal_year , fiscal_quarter , divergence_type , severity , evidence , detected_at , batch_run_dt FROM divergence_detection_result WHERE stock_cd = #{stockCd} ORDER BY batch_run_dt DESC, detected_at DESC

SELECT id , stock_cd , fiscal_year , fiscal_quarter , divergence_type , severity , evidence , detected_at , batch_run_dt FROM divergence_detection_result WHERE batch_run_dt = #{batchRunDt} ORDER BY severity DESC, stock_cd
